title: auricula integrifolia
intro: Auricula integrifolia, also known as Bear's Foot or Bear's Ear, is a flowering plant in the saxifrage family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Auricula integrifolia include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
